name: Measure Galaxy Physical Diameter
description: You need to measure the physical diameter of the M74 galaxy's star-forming disk using archival Far-Ultraviolet (FUV) data from the Ultraviolet Imaging Telescope (UIT) located at /opt/fits_samples/uit_galaxy_sample.fits. Determine the length of the galaxy's major axis in pixels across the visible FUV emission and save an annotated image showing the measurement to ~/AstroImages/uit_galaxy/measurement_overlay.jpg. Using a plate scale of 1.14 arcsec/pixel and a distance to M74 of 9.8 Mpc, calculate the angular size in arcminutes and the physical diameter in kiloparsecs (kpc). Save these measurements to ~/AstroImages/uit_galaxy/galaxy_diameter_report.json with the following keys: "major_axis_pixels" (float), "angular_size_arcmin" (float), and "physical_diameter_kpc" (float).
